title: CSS Positionierung
description: Steuere die Platzierung von Elementen mit CSS-Positionierungs-Eigenschaften.

lessons.title: Relative Position
lessons.task: Mach das Abzeichen relativ positioniert, damit wir es verschieben können.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .card { padding: 1rem; background: white; border: 2px solid #eee; border-radius: 8px; } .card h3 { margin: 0; } .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; background: coral; color: white; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; }

lessons.title: Versatz-Eigenschaften
lessons.description:
With position: relative, use offset properties to nudge the element from its original position:

top - pushes down from top
left - pushes right from left

Negative values move in the opposite direction.
lessons.task: Verschiebe das Abzeichen nach oben mit <kbd>top: -8px</kbd>.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .card { padding: 1rem; background: white; border: 2px solid #eee; border-radius: 8px; } .card h3 { margin: 0; } .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; background: coral; color: white; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; position: relative; }

lessons.title: Absolute Position
lessons.description:
position: absolute removes the element from normal flow and positions it relative to its nearest positioned ancestor (or the viewport if none exists).

Always set a parent to position: relative to contain absolute children.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .modal { position: relative; padding: 2rem; background: white; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); max-width: 250px; } .modal h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; } .modal p { margin: 0; color: #666; } .close { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: none; background: #f5f5f5; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer; }

lessons.title: Absolute Elemente platzieren
lessons.task: Verschiebe den Schließen-Button in die obere rechte Ecke mit <kbd>top: 8px</kbd> und <kbd>right: 8px</kbd>.
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .modal { position: relative; padding: 2rem; background: white; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); max-width: 250px; } .modal h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; } .modal p { margin: 0; color: #666; } .close { position: absolute; width: 32px; height: 32px; border: none; background: #f5f5f5; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer; }
